episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 334: Dominaria United Revelations
episode.description: James and Cliff break down all the latest in fast moving card prices, the latest MTGO Modern and Pioneer results, Cards to Watch and a walk through of all the Dominaria United reveals from the WoTC steam last week, including the confirmation of original Legends boxes being broken down and seeded in DMU Collector Boosters.
